# The PKNCA R Package ![](reference/figures/pknca-hex.png)

The PKNCA R package is designed to perform all noncompartmental analysis
(NCA) calculations for pharmacokinetic (PK) data. The package is broadly
separated into two parts (calculation and summary) with some additional
housekeeping functions.

The primary and secondary goals of the PKNCA package are to 1) only give
correct answers to the specific questions being asked and 2) automate as
much as possible to simplify the task of the analyst. When automation
would leave ambiguity or make a choice that the analyst may have an
alternate preference for, it is either not used, is possible to override
or raises an error message.

Note that backward compatibility will not be guaranteed until version
1.0. Argument and function changes will continue until then. These will
be especially noticeable around the inclusion of IV NCA parameters and
additional specifications of the drug, which include dose amount and
route of administration.

# Citation

Citation information for the PKNCA package is available with a call to
`citation(package="PKNCA")`. The preferred citation until publication of
version 1.0 is below:

Denney W, Duvvuri S and Buckeridge C (2015). “Simple, Automatic
Noncompartmental Analysis: The PKNCA R Package.” *Journal of
Pharmacokinetics and Pharmacodynamics*, *42*(1), pp. 11-107,S65. ISSN
1573-8744, doi: 10.1007/s10928-015-9432-2, \<URL:
<https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/> \>.

# Installation

## From CRAN

The current stable version of PKNCA is available on CRAN. You can
install it and its dependencies using the following command:

``` R
install.packages("PKNCA")
```

## From GitHub

To install the development version from GitHub, type the following
commands:

``` R
install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("humanpred/pknca")
```

# Calculating parameters

``` R
# Load the package
library(PKNCA)
# Set the business rule options with the PKNCA.options() function
# Load your concentration-time data
conc_raw <- read.csv("myconc.csv", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
# Load your dose data
dose_raw <- read.csv("mydose.csv", stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
# Put your concentration data into a PKNCAconc object
o_conc <- PKNCAconc(data=conc_raw,
                    formula=conc~time|treatment+subject/analyte)
# Put your dose data into a PKNCAdose object
o_dose <- PKNCAdose(data=dose_raw,
                    formula=dose~time|treatment+subject)
# Combine the two (and automatically determine the intervals of
# interest
o_data <- PKNCAdata(o_conc, o_dose)
# Compute the NCA parameters
o_results <- pk.nca(o_data)
# Summarize the results
summary(o_results)
```

More help is available in the function help files. Be sure to look at
the PKNCA.options function for options to make PKNCA conform to your
company’s business rules on calculation and summarization.

# Feature requests

Please use the github issues page
(<https://github.com/humanpred/pknca/issues>) to make feature requests
and bug reports.

# Package index

## All functions

- [`PKNCA-package`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCA.md)
  [`PKNCA`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCA.md) :
  Compute noncompartmental pharmacokinetics

- [`PKNCA.choose.option()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCA.choose.option.md)
  : Choose either the value from an option list or the current set value
  for an option.

- [`PKNCA.options()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCA.options.md)
  : Set default options for PKNCA functions

- [`PKNCA.options.describe()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCA.options.describe.md)
  : Describe a PKNCA.options option by name.

- [`PKNCA.set.summary()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCA.set.summary.md)
  : Define how NCA parameters are summarized.

- [`PKNCA_impute_fun_list()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCA_impute_fun_list.md)
  : Separate out a vector of PKNCA imputation methods into a list of
  functions

- [`PKNCA_impute_method_start_conc0()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCA_impute_method.md)
  [`PKNCA_impute_method_start_cmin()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCA_impute_method.md)
  [`PKNCA_impute_method_start_predose()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCA_impute_method.md)
  : Methods for imputation of data with PKNCA

- [`PKNCAconc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCAconc.md)
  : Create a PKNCAconc object

- [`PKNCAdata()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCAdata.md)
  : Create a PKNCAdata object.

- [`PKNCAdose()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCAdose.md)
  : Create a PKNCAdose object

- [`PKNCAresults()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/PKNCAresults.md)
  : Generate a PKNCAresults object

- [`add.interval.col()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/add.interval.col.md)
  : Add columns for calculations within PKNCA intervals

- [`addProvenance()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/addProvenance.md)
  : Add a hash and associated information to enable checking object
  provenance.

- [`adj.r.squared()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/adj.r.squared.md)
  : Calculate the adjusted r-squared value

- [`any_sparse_dense_in_interval()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/any_sparse_dense_in_interval.md)
  : Determine if there are any sparse or dense calculations requested
  within an interval

- [`as.data.frame(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/as.data.frame.PKNCAresults.md)
  : Extract the parameter results from a PKNCAresults and return them as
  a data.frame.

- [`as_PKNCAconc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/as_PKNCAconc.md)
  [`as_PKNCAdose()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/as_PKNCAconc.md)
  [`as_PKNCAdata()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/as_PKNCAconc.md)
  [`as_PKNCAresults()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/as_PKNCAconc.md)
  : Convert an object into a PKNCAconc object

- [`as_sparse_pk()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/as_sparse_pk.md)
  : Generate a sparse_pk object

- [`assert_PKNCAdata()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_PKNCAdata.md)
  [`assert_PKNCAresults()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_PKNCAdata.md)
  [`assert_PKNCAconc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_PKNCAdata.md)
  [`assert_PKNCAdose()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_PKNCAdata.md)
  : Assert that an object is a PKNCAdata object

- [`assert_aucmethod()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_aucmethod.md)
  : Assert that a value is a valid AUC method

- [`assert_conc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_conc_time.md)
  [`assert_time()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_conc_time.md)
  [`assert_conc_time()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_conc_time.md)
  : Verify that concentration measurements are valid

- [`assert_dosetau()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_dosetau.md)
  : Assert that a value is a dosing interval

- [`assert_intervals()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_intervals.md)
  : Assert Intervals

- [`assert_intervaltime_single()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_intervaltime_single.md)
  : Assert that an interval is accurately defined as an interval, and
  return the interval

- [`assert_lambdaz()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_lambdaz.md)
  : Assert that a lambda.z value is valid

- [`assert_number_between()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_number_between.md)
  : Confirm that a value is greater than another value

- [`assert_numeric_between()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_numeric_between.md)
  : Confirm that a value is greater than another value

- [`assert_unit_col()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_unit.md)
  [`assert_unit_value()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_unit.md)
  [`assert_unit()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/assert_unit.md)
  : Assert that a value may either be a column name in the data (first)
  or a single unit value (second)

- [`auc_integrate()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/auc_integrate.md)
  : Support function for AUC integration

- [`business.mean()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/business.mean.md)
  [`business.sd()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/business.mean.md)
  [`business.cv()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/business.mean.md)
  [`business.geomean()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/business.mean.md)
  [`business.geocv()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/business.mean.md)
  [`business.min()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/business.mean.md)
  [`business.max()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/business.mean.md)
  [`business.median()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/business.mean.md)
  [`business.range()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/business.mean.md)
  : Generate functions to do the named function (e.g. mean) applying the
  business rules.

- [`check.conversion()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/check.conversion.md)
  : Check that the conversion to a data type does not change the number
  of NA values

- [`check.interval.specification()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/check.interval.specification.md)
  : Check the formatting of a calculation interval specification data
  frame.

- [`checkProvenance()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/checkProvenance.md)
  : Check the hash of an object to confirm its provenance.

- [`choose.auc.intervals()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/choose.auc.intervals.md)
  : Choose intervals to compute AUCs from time and dosing information

- [`choose_interval_method()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/choose_interval_method.md)
  : Choose how to interpolate, extrapolate, or integrate data in each
  concentration interval

- [`clean.conc.blq()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/clean.conc.blq.md)
  : Handle BLQ values in the concentration measurements as requested by
  the user.

- [`clean.conc.na()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/clean.conc.na.md)
  : Handle NA values in the concentration measurements as requested by
  the user.

- [`cov_holder()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/cov_holder.md)
  : Calculate the covariance for two time points with sparse sampling

- [`check.conc.time()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/defunct.md)
  : The following functions are defunct

- [`ensure_column_unit_exists()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/ensure_column_unit_exists.md)
  : Ensure Unit Columns Exist in PKNCA Object

- [`exclude()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/exclude.md)
  : Exclude data points or results from calculations or summarization.

- [`exclude_nca_span.ratio()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/exclude_nca.md)
  [`exclude_nca_max.aucinf.pext()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/exclude_nca.md)
  [`exclude_nca_count_conc_measured()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/exclude_nca.md)
  [`exclude_nca_min.hl.r.squared()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/exclude_nca.md)
  [`exclude_nca_min.hl.adj.r.squared()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/exclude_nca.md)
  [`exclude_nca_tmax_early()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/exclude_nca.md)
  [`exclude_nca_tmax_0()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/exclude_nca.md)
  : Exclude NCA parameters based on examining the parameter set.

- [`exclude_nca_by_param()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/exclude_nca_by_param.md)
  : Exclude NCA Results Based on Parameter Thresholds

- [`filter(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/filter.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`filter(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/filter.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`filter(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/filter.PKNCAresults.md)
  : dplyr filtering for PKNCA

- [`find.tau()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/find.tau.md)
  : Find the repeating interval within a vector of doses

- [`findOperator()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/findOperator.md)
  : Find the first occurrence of an operator in a formula and return the
  left, right, or both sides of the operator.

- [`fit_half_life()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/fit_half_life.md)
  : Perform the half-life fit given the data. The function simply fits
  the data without any validation. No selection of points or any other
  components are done.

- [`fit_half_life_tobit()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/fit_half_life_tobit.md)
  : Perform a Tobit half-life fit given the data. The function fits the
  data using maximum likelihood without any point selection or
  validation.

- [`fit_half_life_tobit_LL()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/fit_half_life_tobit_LL.md)
  : Negative log-likelihood for Tobit half-life regression

- [`formula(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/formula.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`formula(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/formula.PKNCAconc.md)
  : Extract the formula from a PKNCAconc object.

- [`geomean()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/geomean.md)
  [`geosd()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/geomean.md)
  [`geocv()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/geomean.md) :
  Compute the geometric mean, sd, and CV

- [`get.best.model()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/get.best.model.md)
  : Extract the best model from a list of models using the AIC.

- [`get.interval.cols()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/get.interval.cols.md)
  : Get the columns that can be used in an interval specification

- [`get.parameter.deps()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/get.parameter.deps.md)
  : Get all columns that depend on a parameter

- [`getAttributeColumn()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/getAttributeColumn.md)
  : Retrieve the value of an attribute column.

- [`getColumnValueOrNot()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/getColumnValueOrNot.md)
  : Get the value from a column in a data frame if the value is a column
  there, otherwise, the value should be a scalar or the length of the
  data.

- [`getDataName()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/getDataName.md)
  : Get the name of the element containing the data for the current
  object.

- [`getDepVar()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/getDepVar.md)
  : Get the dependent variable (left hand side of the formula) from a
  PKNCA object.

- [`getGroups(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/getGroups.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`getGroups(`*`<PKNCAdata>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/getGroups.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`getGroups(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/getGroups.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`getGroups(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/getGroups.PKNCAconc.md)
  :

  Get the groups (right hand side after the `|` from a PKNCA object).

- [`getIndepVar()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/getIndepVar.md)
  : Get the independent variable (right hand side of the formula) from a
  PKNCA object.

- [`get_halflife_points()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/get_halflife_points.md)
  : Determine which concentrations were used for half-life calculation

- [`get_impute_method()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/get_impute_method.md)
  : Get the impute function from either the intervals column or from the
  method

- [`group_by(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/group_by.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`group_by(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/group_by.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`group_by(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/group_by.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`ungroup(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/group_by.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`ungroup(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/group_by.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`ungroup(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/group_by.PKNCAresults.md)
  : dplyr grouping for PKNCA

- [`group_vars(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/group_vars.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`group_vars(`*`<PKNCAdata>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/group_vars.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`group_vars(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/group_vars.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`group_vars(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/group_vars.PKNCAconc.md)
  : Get grouping variables for a PKNCA object

- [`inner_join(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`left_join(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`right_join(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`full_join(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`inner_join(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`left_join(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`right_join(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`full_join(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`inner_join(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`left_join(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`right_join(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`full_join(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/inner_join.PKNCAresults.md)
  : dplyr joins for PKNCA

- [`interp.extrap.conc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/interp.extrap.conc.md)
  [`interpolate.conc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/interp.extrap.conc.md)
  [`extrapolate.conc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/interp.extrap.conc.md)
  [`interp.extrap.conc.dose()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/interp.extrap.conc.md)
  : Interpolate concentrations between measurements or extrapolate
  concentrations after the last measurement.

- [`interpolate_conc_linear()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/interp_extrap_conc_method.md)
  [`interpolate_conc_log()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/interp_extrap_conc_method.md)
  [`extrapolate_conc_lambdaz()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/interp_extrap_conc_method.md)
  : Interpolate or extrapolate concentrations using the provided method

- [`is_sparse_pk()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/is_sparse_pk.md)
  : Is a PKNCA object used for sparse PK?

- [`model.frame(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/model.frame.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`model.frame(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/model.frame.PKNCAconc.md)
  : Extract the columns used in the formula (in order) from a PKNCAconc
  or PKNCAdose object.

- [`mutate(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/mutate.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`mutate(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/mutate.PKNCAresults.md)
  [`mutate(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/mutate.PKNCAresults.md)
  : dplyr mutate-based modification for PKNCA

- [`normalize()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/normalize.md)
  : Normalize parameters in a PKNCAresults object or data.frame

- [`normalize_by_col()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/normalize_by_col.md)
  : Internal function to normalize by a specified column

- [`normalize_exclude()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/normalize_exclude.md)
  : Normalize the exclude column by setting blanks to NA

- [`parse_formula_to_cols()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/parse_formula_to_cols.md)
  : Convert a formula representation to the columns for input data

- [`pk.business()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.business.md)
  :

  Run any function with a maximum missing fraction of X and 0s possibly
  counting as missing. The maximum fraction missing comes from
  `PKNCA.options("max.missing")`.

- [`pk.calc.ae()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.ae.md)
  : Calculate amount excreted (typically in urine or feces)

- [`pk.calc.aucabove()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.aucabove.md)
  : Calculate the AUC above a given concentration

- [`pk.calc.aucpext()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.aucpext.md)
  : Calculate the AUC percent extrapolated

- [`pk.calc.auxc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.auc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.auc.last()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.auc.inf()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.auc.inf.obs()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.auc.inf.pred()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.auc.all()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumc.last()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumc.inf()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumc.inf.obs()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumc.inf.pred()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumc.all()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxc.md)
  : Compute the Area Under the (Moment) Curve

- [`pk.calc.auxcint()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  [`pk.calc.aucint()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  [`pk.calc.aucint.last()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  [`pk.calc.aucint.all()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  [`pk.calc.aucint.inf.obs()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  [`pk.calc.aucint.inf.pred()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumcint()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumcint.last()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumcint.all()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumcint.inf.obs()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumcint.inf.pred()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxcint.md)
  : Calculate AUXC (AUC or AUMC) over an interval with
  interpolation/extrapolation

- [`pk.calc.auxciv()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxciv.md)
  [`pk.calc.auciv()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxciv.md)
  [`pk.calc.auciv_pbext()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxciv.md)
  [`pk.calc.aumciv()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.auxciv.md)
  : Calculate AUXC (AUC or AUMC) for IV dosing with C0
  back-extrapolation

- [`pk.calc.c0()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.c0.md)
  [`pk.calc.c0.method.logslope()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.c0.md)
  [`pk.calc.c0.method.c0()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.c0.md)
  [`pk.calc.c0.method.c1()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.c0.md)
  [`pk.calc.c0.method.set0()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.c0.md)
  [`pk.calc.c0.method.cmin()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.c0.md)
  : Estimate the concentration at dosing time for an IV bolus dose.

- [`pk.calc.cav()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.cav.md)
  : Calculate the average concentration during an interval.

- [`pk.calc.ceoi()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.ceoi.md)
  : Determine the concentration at the end of infusion

- [`pk.calc.cl()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.cl.md)
  : Calculate the (observed oral) clearance

- [`pk.calc.clast.obs()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.clast.obs.md)
  : Determine the last observed concentration above the limit of
  quantification (LOQ).

- [`pk.calc.clr()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.clr.md)
  : Calculate renal clearance

- [`pk.calc.cmax()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.cmax.md)
  [`pk.calc.cmin()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.cmax.md)
  : Determine maximum observed PK concentration

- [`pk.calc.count_conc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.count_conc.md)
  [`pk.calc.count_conc_measured()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.count_conc.md)
  : Count the number of concentration measurements in an interval

- [`pk.calc.ctrough()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.ctrough.md)
  [`pk.calc.cstart()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.ctrough.md)
  : Determine the trough (end of interval) concentration

- [`pk.calc.deg.fluc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.deg.fluc.md)
  [`pk.calc.swing()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.deg.fluc.md)
  : Determine the degree of fluctuation

- [`pk.calc.dn()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.dn.md)
  : Determine dose normalized NCA parameter

- [`pk.calc.ermax()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.ermax.md)
  : Calculate the maximum excretion rate

- [`pk.calc.ertlst()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.ertlst.md)
  : Calculate the midpoint collection time of the last measurable
  excretion rate

- [`pk.calc.ertmax()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.ertmax.md)
  : Calculate the midpoint collection time of the maximum excretion rate

- [`pk.calc.f()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.f.md)
  : Calculate the absolute (or relative) bioavailability

- [`pk.calc.fe()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.fe.md)
  : Calculate fraction excreted (typically in urine or feces)

- [`pk.calc.half.life()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.half.life.md)
  : Compute the half-life and associated parameters

- [`pk.calc.kel()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.kel.md)
  : Calculate the elimination rate (Kel)

- [`pk.calc.mrt()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.mrt.md)
  [`pk.calc.mrt.iv()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.mrt.md)
  [`pk.calc.mrt.md()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.mrt.md)
  : Calculate the mean residence time (MRT) for single-dose data or
  linear multiple-dose data.

- [`pk.calc.ptr()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.ptr.md)
  : Determine the peak-to-trough ratio

- [`pk.calc.sparse_auc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.sparse_auc.md)
  [`pk.calc.sparse_auclast()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.sparse_auc.md)
  : Calculate AUC and related parameters using sparse NCA methods

- [`pk.calc.sparse_aumc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.sparse_aumc.md)
  [`pk.calc.sparse_aumclast()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.sparse_aumc.md)
  : Calculate AUMC and related parameters using sparse NCA methods

- [`pk.calc.thalf.eff()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.thalf.eff.md)
  : Calculate the effective half-life

- [`pk.calc.time_above()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.time_above.md)
  : Determine time at or above a set value

- [`pk.calc.tlag()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.tlag.md)
  : Determine the observed lag time (time before the first concentration
  above the limit of quantification or above the first concentration in
  the interval)

- [`pk.calc.tlast()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.tlast.md)
  [`pk.calc.tfirst()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.tlast.md)
  : Determine time of last observed concentration above the limit of
  quantification.

- [`pk.calc.tmax()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.tmax.md)
  : Determine time of maximum observed PK concentration

- [`pk.calc.tmin()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.tmin.md)
  : Determine time of minimum observed PK concentration

- [`pk.calc.totdose()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.totdose.md)
  : Extract the dose used for calculations

- [`pk.calc.volpk()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.volpk.md)
  : Calculate the total urine volume

- [`pk.calc.vz()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.vz.md)
  [`pk.calc.vss()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.calc.vz.md)
  : Calculate the terminal volume of distribution (Vz)

- [`pk.nca()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.nca.md) :
  Compute NCA parameters for each interval for each subject.

- [`pk.nca.interval()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.nca.interval.md)
  : Compute all PK parameters for a single concentration-time data set

- [`pk.nca.intervals()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.nca.intervals.md)
  : Compute NCA for multiple intervals

- [`pk.tss()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.tss.md) :
  Compute the time to steady-state (tss)

- [`pk.tss.data.prep()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.tss.data.prep.md)
  : Clean up the time to steady-state parameters and return a data frame
  for use by the tss calculators.

- [`pk.tss.monoexponential()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.tss.monoexponential.md)
  : Compute the time to steady state using nonlinear, mixed-effects
  modeling of trough concentrations.

- [`pk.tss.monoexponential.individual()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.tss.monoexponential.individual.md)
  : A helper function to estimate individual and single outputs for
  monoexponential time to steady-state.

- [`pk.tss.monoexponential.population()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.tss.monoexponential.population.md)
  : A helper function to estimate population and popind outputs for
  monoexponential time to steady-state.

- [`pk.tss.stepwise.linear()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk.tss.stepwise.linear.md)
  : Compute the time to steady state using stepwise test of linear trend

- [`pk_nca_result_to_df()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pk_nca_result_to_df.md)
  : Convert the grouping info and list of results for each group into a
  results data.frame

- [`pknca_find_units_param()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pknca_find_units_param.md)
  : Find NCA parameters with a given unit type

- [`pknca_unit_conversion()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pknca_unit_conversion.md)
  : Perform unit conversion (if possible) on PKNCA results

- [`pknca_units_add_paren()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pknca_units_add_paren.md)
  : Add parentheses to a unit value, if needed

- [`pknca_units_table()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/pknca_units_table.md)
  : Create a unit assignment and conversion table

- [`print(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/print.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`summary(`*`<PKNCAconc>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/print.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`print(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/print.PKNCAconc.md)
  [`summary(`*`<PKNCAdose>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/print.PKNCAconc.md)
  : Print and/or summarize a PKNCAconc or PKNCAdose object.

- [`print(`*`<PKNCAdata>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/print.PKNCAdata.md)
  : Print a PKNCAdata object

- [`print(`*`<provenance>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/print.provenance.md)
  : Print the summary of a provenance object

- [`print(`*`<summary_PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/print.summary_PKNCAresults.md)
  : Print the results summary

- [`roundString()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/roundString.md)
  : Round a value to a defined number of digits printing out trailing
  zeros, if applicable.

- [`roundingSummarize()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/roundingSummarize.md)
  : During the summarization of PKNCAresults, do the rounding of values
  based on the instructions given.

- [`select_minimal_grouping_cols()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/select_minimal_grouping_cols.md)
  : Find Minimal Grouping Columns for Strata Reconstruction

- [`setAttributeColumn()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/setAttributeColumn.md)
  : Add an attribute to an object where the attribute is added as a name
  to the names of the object.

- [`setDuration()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/setDuration.md)
  : Set the duration of dosing or measurement

- [`setExcludeColumn()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/setExcludeColumn.md)
  : Set the exclude parameter on an object

- [`setRoute()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/setRoute.md)
  : Set the dosing route

- [`set_intervals()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/set_intervals.md)
  : Set Intervals

- [`signifString()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/signifString.md)
  : Round a value to a defined number of significant digits printing out
  trailing zeros, if applicable.

- [`sort(`*`<interval.cols>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/sort.interval.cols.md)
  : Sort the interval columns by dependencies.

- [`sparse_auc_weight_linear()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/sparse_auc_weight_linear.md)
  : Calculate the weight for sparse AUC calculation with the
  linear-trapezoidal rule

- [`sparse_mean()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/sparse_mean.md)
  : Calculate the mean concentration at all time points for use in
  sparse NCA calculations

- [`sparse_pk_attribute()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/sparse_pk_attribute.md)
  : Set or get a sparse_pk object attribute

- [`sparse_to_dense_pk()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/sparse_to_dense_pk.md)
  : Extract the mean concentration-time profile as a data.frame

- [`summary(`*`<PKNCAdata>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/summary.PKNCAdata.md)
  : Summarize a PKNCAdata object showing important details about the
  concentration, dosing, and interval information.

- [`summary(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/summary.PKNCAresults.md)
  : Summarize PKNCA results

- [`superposition()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/superposition.md)
  : Compute noncompartmental superposition for repeated dosing

- [`time_calc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/time_calc.md)
  : Times relative to an event (typically dosing)

- [`tss.monoexponential.generate.formula()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/tss.monoexponential.generate.formula.md)
  : A helper function to generate the formula and starting values for
  the parameters in monoexponential models.

- [`update(`*`<PKNCAresults>`*`)`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/update.PKNCAresults.md)
  : Update existing PKNCAresults with new data

- [`var_sparse_auc()`](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/reference/var_sparse_auc.md)
  : Calculate the variance for the AUC of sparsely sampled PK

# Articles

### All vignettes

- [Introduction to PKNCA and Usage
  Instructions](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v01-introduction-and-usage.md):
- [Computing NCA Parameters for
  Theophylline](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v02-example-theophylline.md):
- [Selection of Calculation
  Intervals](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v03-selection-of-calculation-intervals.md):
- [Sparse NCA
  Calculations](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v04-sparse.md):
- [AUC Calculation with
  PKNCA](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v05-auc-calculation-with-PKNCA.md):
- [Half-life calculation with Tobit
  regression](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v06-half-life-calculation-tobit.md):
- [Half-Life
  Calculation](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v06-half-life-calculation.md):
- [Post-Processing](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v07-post-processing.md):
- [Unit Assignment and Conversion with
  PKNCA](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v07-unit-conversion.md):
- [Data
  Imputation](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v08-data-imputation.md):
- [Superposition of Pharmacokinetic
  Data](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v20-superposition.md):
- [Methods Used for Dose-Aware Concentration
  Interpolation/Extrapolation](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v21-methods-for-dose-aware-interpolation-and-extrapolation.md):
- [Noncompartmental evaluation of time to
  steady-state](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v22-time-to-steady-state.md):
- [AUC integration
  methods](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v23-auc-integration-methods.md):
- [PKNCA Training
  Sessions](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v30-training-session.md):
- [PKNCA – an R package for noncompartmental analysis of pharmacokinetic
  data](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v31-FDA-introduction.md):
- [Options for Controlling
  PKNCA](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v40-options-for-controlling-PKNCA.md):
- [PKNCA
  Validation](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v60-PKNCA-validation.md):
- [Writing PKNCA Parameter
  Functions](https://humanpred.github.io/pknca/articles/v80-writing-parameter-functions.md):
